name: ACACIA RESEARCH CORP
business: Acacia Research Corporation is a disciplined value-oriented acquirer and operator of businesses across industrial, energy, and technology sectors. Its operating businesses include Printronix (industrial impact printers and consumables), Deflecto (specialty manufacturer for commercial transportation, HVAC, and office markets), Benchmark (oil and gas production), and a patent licensing business.
sellsTo: Industrial labeling and inventory management customers
Commercial transportation, HVAC, and office markets

exposures.sentence: Our Energy Operations Business consists of the Company’s approximately 73.5% interest in Benchmark Energy II, LLC (Benchmark).
Printronix is a leading manufacturer and distributor of industrial impact printers, also known as line matrix printers, and related consumables and services.
Deflecto is a leading specialty manufacturer of essential products serving the commercial transportation, HVAC, and office markets.
We acquired one new patent portfolio during the year ended December 31, 2025 consisting of Wi-Fi 7 standard essential patents.

catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, Benchmark spud its first horizontal development well which is expected to be completed and producing in the first quarter of 2026.
